data.name: DisplaySettings_Language_Description
data.value: Select the display language for the software.

data.name: DisplaySettings_Theme_Description
data.value: Select the display theme for the software.

data.name: ProxySettings_IsEnabled_Description
data.value: Override the system proxy with an application-specific proxy.

data.name: ProxySettings_Endpoint_Description
data.value: Enter the proxy URI, for example http://127.0.0.1:7890.

data.name: ProxySettings_BypassOnLocal_Description
data.value: Send requests to intranet and loopback addresses directly.

data.name: ProxySettings_BypassList_Description
data.value: Optional. One pattern per line; matching hosts bypass the proxy.

data.name: ProxySettings_UseAuthentication_Description
data.value: Enable credentials when the proxy requires authentication.

data.name: ProxySettings_Username_Description
data.value: User name for the proxy server.

data.name: ShortcutSettings_ChatWindow_Desription
data.value: Set a shortcut to invoke the chat window at any time.

data.name: Assistant_Temperature_Description
data.value: Generally, a higher value results in more creative and imaginative responses, while a lower value tends to be more precise. Some models may produce garbled output if the value exceeds 1.0. It is usually recommended not to change top_p simultaneously. If you encounter errors, try reverting to default values.

data.name: Assistant_TopP_Description
data.value: Controls the diversity of the model's output text. Typically, a higher value allows the model to accept more potential responses, while a lower value leans towards the most likely answer. It is usually recommended not to change temperature simultaneously. If you encounter errors, try reverting to default values.

data.name: WebSearchEnginePluginSettings_SelectedProvider_Description
data.value: Select the service provider for web search engines.

data.name: WebSearchEngineProvider_EndPoint_Description
data.value: Leaving this to default if you don't know what to do. Must starts with "http(s)://".

data.name: ChatInputArea_ImageButton_ToolTip
data.value: Allow access to aware your screen

data.name: ChatInputArea_ToolCallButton_ToolTip
data.value: Use tools to enhance assistant capabilities (Ctrl+T)

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_BadRequest
data.value: Bad request, possibly due to an incorrect API key or unsupported network/region.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_Unauthorized
data.value: Unauthorized request, possibly due to an incorrect API key or unsupported network/region.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_Forbidden
data.value: Request forbidden, possibly due to an incorrect API key or unsupported network/region.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_InternalServerError
data.value: Server encountered an error, please try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_ServiceUnavailable
data.value: Server unavailable, please try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_GatewayTimeout
data.value: Gateway connection timed out, please check your network or try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_RequestTimeout
data.value: Request connection timed out, please check your network or try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_BadGateway
data.value: Gateway connection error, please check your network or try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_HttpRequest_0
data.value: Unknown error, please try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_Socket_HostNotFound
data.value: Hostname could not be resolved, please check your DNS settings or try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_Socket_ConnectionRefused
data.value: Connection refused, please check your network or try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_Socket_ConnectionReset
data.value: Connection reset, please check your network or try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_Socket_ConnectionAborted
data.value: Connection aborted, please check your network or try again later.

data.name: FriendlyExceptionMessage_Socket_0
data.value: Unknown error, please try again later.

data.name: LocaleName_ZhHantHk
data.value: 中文 (繁體 香港特別行政區)

data.name: AboutPage_Description
data.value: Perceives your screen content in real-time, breaking down application barriers to provide intelligent assistance that truly fits the current context, transforming your desktop into a seamless, intelligent workspace.

data.name: App_EverywhereIsAlreadyRunning
data.value: Everywhere is already running, please check Tray Icon.

data.name: WelcomeView_IntroStep_Message2
data.value: Nice to meet you! Let me be your assistant and help you solve problems!

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_WindowPinMode_Description
data.value: Specifies the pin mode for the chat window when it is opened. When the window is not fixed, it will be hidden automatically when it loses focus.

data.name: PersistentState_VisualContextDetailLevel_Description
data.value: If visual element attachments are added, Everywhere will collect them along with surrounding elements as structured text before sending to the assistant. This option controls the richness and amount of information collected.

data.name: CustomAssistant_PresencePenalty_Description
data.value: The higher the value, the more inclined to use different expressions and avoid concept repetition; the lower the value, the more inclined to use repeated concepts or narratives, resulting in more consistent expression. This setting is only effective for some models. If you encounter an error, try restoring the default value.

data.name: CustomAssistant_FrequencyPenalty_Description
data.value: The higher the value, the more diverse and rich the vocabulary; the lower the value, the simpler and more straightforward the language. This setting is only effective for some models. If you encounter an error, try restoring the default value.

data.name: CustomAssistant_Endpoint_Description
data.value: Starts with http:// or https://. Add # at the end to prevent automatic version suffix.

data.name: CustomAssistant_ApiKey_Description
data.value: If using an online model, obtain it from the respective official source. Please refer to the documentation for details.

data.name: CustomAssistant_InputModalities_Description
data.value: Supported input modalities for the model; selecting incorrectly may lead to invocation failure.

data.name: CustomAssistant_SupportsToolCall_Description
data.value: The model supports using configured tools. Enabling this option may cause errors during conversation if the model does not support it.

data.name: CustomAssistant_SupportsReasoning_Description
data.value: The model supports reasoning before responding. Enabling this option may cause errors in conversations if the model does not support it. Note that this option only affects how Everywhere handles model responses and does not control whether the model actually enables reasoning. For models that can dynamically toggle reasoning, enable this option and then adjust the 'Enable Reasoning' option below.

data.name: CustomAssistant_ContextLimit_Description
data.value: Maximum context length for the conversation (context_limit). This will affect the strategy for building visual context, so please set it to a realistic value.

data.name: CustomAssistant_Schema_Description
data.value: Select the API protocol. Note that this is not always associated with the model; for example, Gemini provides an OpenAI-compatible protocol, please refer to the official usage instructions for the corresponding model.

data.name: SoftwareSettings_IsStartupEnabled_Description
data.value: Everywhere will run automatically after startup. If “Startup as Administrator” is enabled, the current option can only be disabled in administrator mode.

data.name: SoftwareSettings_IsAdministratorStartupEnabled_Description
data.value: Everywhere will start automatically as an administrator at boot. This option can only be toggled in administrator mode.

data.name: SoftwareSettings_RestartAsAdministrator_Description
data.value: Due to operating system restrictions, when running any application as an administrator (elevated permissions), Everywhere may not work correctly when the elevated applications are in focus or trying to interact with a Everywhere feature like "Pick Element". This can be addressed by running Everywhere as administrator.

data.name: SoftwareSettings_DebugFeatures_Description
data.value: Access and manage application settings file and logs.

data.name: SoftwareSettings_SoftwareUpdate_Description
data.value: If an update is available, click Update and Everywhere will automatically download and install the latest version. You may need to select “Yes” in the pop-up window during the process.

data.name: SoftwareSettings_IsAutomaticUpdateCheckEnabled_Description
data.value: If enabled, Everywhere will periodically check for updates (only when Everywhere is running, no extra load to the system).

data.name: CustomAssistant_ModelId_Description
data.value: The model identifier for API calls, such as gpt-4o.

data.name: ChatPluginPage_Description
data.value: Chat plugins include built-in plugins and MCP plugins. LLMs that support tool calls will use these plugins at appropriate times (such as searching the web or accessing local files) to gain more powerful functionality.

data.name: WebSearchEngineProvider_ApiKey_Description
data.value: Obtain it from the respective official source. Please refer to the documentation for details.

data.name: WebSearchEngineProvider_SearchEngineId_Description
data.value: Provides a programmable search engine ID. Please refer to the documentation for details.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_Description
data.value: Enables browsing the web. The knowledge of major models often becomes fixed after release, leading to hallucinations when addressing timeliness issues. This plugin allows the assistant to browse web content in real-time, enhancing its capabilities.

data.name: Windows_BuiltInChatPlugin_PowerShell_Description
data.value: Provides the ability to execute PowerShell scripts, allowing direct interaction with the system. However, it is also dangerous and may result in accidental file deletion or system crashes.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_Description
data.value: Provides the ability to access files, such as enumerating, creating, deleting, renaming, reading, or writing.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_VisualContext_Description
data.value: Provides the ability to perceive and interact with screen content.

data.name: MainViewModel_UpgradeSuccessfulToast_Title
data.value: Everywhere has been updated to the latest version 🎉

data.name: WelcomeView_ConfiguratorStep_Message1
data.value: Let's start with the first step: choose a 'brain' for me! My intelligence is powered by large language models, and I need your help to configure it. I have provided several configuration modes for you to choose from, just select the one that suits you best.

data.name: WelcomeView_ConfiguratorStep_Message2
data.value: Don't worry, if it doesn't fit, you can always go back and choose again.

data.name: WelcomeView_AssistantStep_PresetBased_Message1
data.value: Welcome to the preset mode. Just select the large model provider you want to use, then obtain the API key and fill it in, and finally choose the model to get started!

data.name: WelcomeView_AssistantStep_PresetBased_Message2
data.value: Don't worry, your key will be stored encrypted, I cannot read it.

data.name: WelcomeView_IntroStep_Message6
data.value: Tip: You can click “About - Welcome Page” to reopen this message.

data.name: WelcomeView_IntroStep_Message3
data.value: You can wake me up anytime, everywhere. I can understand your current work context—whether it's emails, articles, or web pages—and help you solve problems more intelligently!

data.name: WelcomeView_IntroStep_Message4
data.value: If this is your first time using it, I'll guide you through the initial setup in three simple steps.

data.name: WelcomeView_AssistantStep_PresetBased_Message3
data.value: If you don't know how to choose or obtain the API key, please refer to the tutorial here.

data.name: WelcomeView_AssistantStep_PresetBased_Message4
data.value: After completing your selection, please click 'Test assistant availability', and I will check if the configuration is correct.

data.name: WelcomeView_AssistantStep_PresetBased_Message5
data.value: 🎉 Verify successful! Let's move on to the final step!

data.name: WelcomeView_ShortcutStep_Message1
data.value: Congratulations! Everything is complete. You can wake me up anytime using the shortcut key below.

data.name: WelcomeView_ShortcutStep_Message2
data.value: If there's no response, it might be occupied by other software. You can click to change the shortcut key.

data.name: WelcomeView_TelemetryStep_Message1
data.value: To help me grow, we invite you to join the user experience program. We will collect your usage data, which will only be used for analysis and does not contain or allow for any inference of personal data about you.

data.name: WelcomeView_TelemetryStep_Message2
data.value: If you do not join, only necessary data will be sent. Rest assured, this choice will not affect core functionality.

data.name: SoftwareSettings_DiagnosticData_Description
data.value: To help us improve, we invite you to join the user experience program. We will collect your usage data, which will only be used for analysis and does not contain or allow for any inference of personal data about you. If you do not join, only necessary data will be sent. This choice will not affect core functionality.

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_ShowChatStatistics_Description
data.value: When enabled, usage data will be displayed at the end of each conversation round within the chat window.

data.name: HandledChatException_InvalidConfiguration
data.value: Model configuration is incorrect, model provider or model ID is missing or invalid, or the current model does not support image input/tool calls.

data.name: HandledChatException_InvalidApiKey
data.value: API key is missing or invalid.

data.name: HandledChatException_QuotaExceeded
data.value: Exceeding API usage quotas, which typically indicates insufficient balance or lack of access permissions for the current model.

data.name: HandledChatException_RateLimit
data.value: Request too frequent, insufficient account balance, or network/region not supported.

data.name: HandledChatException_EndpointNotReachable
data.value: Service endpoint is not reachable. Please check your network connection.

data.name: HandledChatException_EmptyResponse
data.value: Service returned an empty response, which may indicate a network or service issue.

data.name: HandledChatException_FeatureNotSupport
data.value: Selected model does not support the requested feature.

data.name: HandledChatException_ImageNotSupport
data.value: Selected model does not support image input.

data.name: HandledChatException_Timeout
data.value: Request to the service timed out. Please try again.

data.name: HandledChatException_NetworkError
data.value: A network error has occurred. Please check your network or proxy settings, or your service provider may not support your region.

data.name: HandledChatException_ServiceUnavailable
data.value: Service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_AutomaticallyAddElement_Description
data.value: When enabled, automatically add focused element as attachment when opening chat window.

data.name: ChatPluginPage_SelectToViewDetails
data.value: Select an item on the left to view details

data.name: HandledChatException_ContextLengthExceeded
data.value: The context length exceeds the limit. Try creating a new chat or switching to a model with a longer context.

data.name: CustomAssistant_Name_Description
data.value: Specify the name of the assistant for display and differentiation purposes.

data.name: CustomAssistant_Description_Description
data.value: Specify the description of the assistant for display and differentiation purposes.

data.name: CustomAssistant_SystemPrompt_Description
data.value: The system prompt will be sent to the model at the beginning of the conversation and will be kept up to date with each message sent. Placeholders can be used in the prompt, enclosed in {}, which will be replaced with the corresponding content before being sent to the model.

data.name: CustomAssistantPageViewModel_DeleteCustomAssistant_Dialog_Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the "{0}"?

data.name: HandledSystemException_IOException
data.value: A general I/O error occurred. This might be due to a problem with reading or writing a file.

data.name: HandledSystemException_UnauthorizedAccess
data.value: Access to a required resource was denied. Please check file permissions or run the application as an administrator.

data.name: HandledSystemException_PathTooLong
data.value: Specified file or directory path is too long. Please try using a shorter path.

data.name: HandledSystemException_Timeout
data.value: Operation timed out. Please check your system performance and try again.

data.name: HandledSystemException_FileNotFound
data.value: Specified file not found. Please ensure the file exists and the path is correct.

data.name: HandledSystemException_DirectoryNotFound
data.value: Specified directory not found. Please ensure the directory exists and the path is correct.

data.name: HandledSystemException_NotSupported
data.value: Requested operation is not supported on your system.

data.name: HandledSystemException_Security
data.value: A security error occurred. The application may not have the necessary permissions.

data.name: HandledSystemException_COMException
data.value: System component (COM) error occurred. This may indicate an issue with the OS or a dependency.

data.name: HandledSystemException_Win32Exception
data.value: A Windows system error occurred. Please check the application logs for more details.

data.name: HandledSystemException_Socket
data.value: A network socket error occurred. Please check your network connection and firewall settings.

data.name: HandledSystemException_OutOfMemory
data.value: Application ran out of memory. Please close other programs and try again.

data.name: HandledSystemException_DriveNotFound
data.value: Specified drive not found. Please ensure the drive is connected and accessible.

data.name: HandledSystemException_EndOfStream
data.value: An unexpected end of a data stream was reached. This might indicate a corrupted file or network issue.

data.name: HandledSystemException_InvalidData
data.value: Data being processed is invalid or corrupted. Please check the source file or data.

data.name: HandledSystemException_Unknown
data.value: An unexpected system error occurred. Please try again or check the application logs.

data.name: HandledSystemException_InvalidOperation
data.value: Operation is invalid. Please ensure the configuration is correct.

data.name: HandledSystemException_InvalidArgument
data.value: Argument is invalid. Please ensure the configuration is correct.

data.name: HandledSystemException_InvalidFormat
data.value: Format is invalid. Please ensure the configuration is correct.

data.name: HandledSystemException_ArgumentNull
data.value: Argument is empty. Please ensure the configuration is correct.

data.name: HandledSystemException_ArgumentOutOfRange
data.value: Argument is out of valid range. Please ensure the configuration is correct.

data.name: HandledSystemException_SSLConnectionError
data.value: The SSL connection could not be established. Please check your network settings or certificate.

data.name: HandledSystemException_ConnectionRefused
data.value: Connection was refused by the server. Please check your network connection and proxy settings.

data.name: HandledSystemException_HostNotFound
data.value: The host could not be found. Please check the address and your network connection.

data.name: Windows_BuiltInChatPlugin_Everything_Description
data.value: Use Everything (a high-performance local file search engine) to search for files on your computer.

data.name: CustomAssistantPage_CheckConnectivityButton_ToolTip
data.value: Confirm the availability of the model service

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_DeleteFiles_DeletionConsent_Header
data.value: {0} files or folders will be deleted

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_DeleteFiles_SystemFile_DeletionConsent_Header
data.value: System file or directory will be deleted

data.name: ChatPluginConsentRequest_Common_Header
data.value: Do you allow '{0}' to execute? It requires '{1}' permission.

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_TemporaryChatMode_Description
data.value: Whether to use temporary chats when creating new chats.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_SearchFiles_Description
data.value: Search for files or directories in a specified path matching the given pattern.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_GetFileInformation_Description
data.value: Get information about a file or directory at the specified path.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_SearchFileContent_Description
data.value: Search for a specific text within file(s) and return matching lines.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_ReadFile_Description
data.value: Read the content of a file at the specified path.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_MoveFile_Description
data.value: Move or rename a file or directory.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_DeleteFiles_Description
data.value: Delete files or directories at the specified path.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_CreateDirectory_Description
data.value: Create a new directory at the specified path.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_WriteToFile_Description
data.value: Write content to a text file at the specified path.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_ReplaceFileContent_Description
data.value: Replace content in a text file.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_ReadFile_FileTooLarge_ErrorMessage
data.value: File size exceeds 10 MB; read operation is not supported.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_DeleteFiles_SystemFile_Deletion_ErrorMessage
data.value: Cannot delete system files or directories.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_WriteToFile_BinaryFile_Write_ErrorMessage
data.value: Cannot write to a binary file.

data.name: HandledFunctionInvokingException_ArgumentError
data.value: The model provided an invalid value for the parameter '{0}', likely due to hallucination.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_ReplaceFileContent_FileTooLarge_ErrorMessage
data.value: File size is larger than 10 MB, replace operation is not supported.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_ReplaceFileContent_BinaryFile_ErrorMessage
data.value: Cannot replace content in a binary file.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_EnsureDirectoryInfo_PathIsFile_ErrorMessage
data.value: Specified path is a file, not a directory.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_EnsureDirectoryInfo_PathNotExist_ErrorMessage
data.value: Specified path is not a valid file or directory.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_EnsureFileInfo_PathIsDirectory_ErrorMessage
data.value: Specified path is a directory, not a file.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_FileSystem_EnsureFileInfo_PathNotExist_ErrorMessage
data.value: Specified file or directory was not found.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_VisualContext_CaptureVisualElementById_Description
data.value: Capture a screenshot of a visual element.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_VisualContext_ExecuteVisualActions_Description
data.value: Execute a set of automated actions, such as clicks, inputs, or sending shortcuts.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_WebExtract_Description
data.value: Extracts the main content of a webpage. This runs a hidden web browser in the background using Puppeteer to access the webpage. For compatibility, the first launch may automatically download the web browser, which may take some time depending on network conditions.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_NoWebSearchEngineProviderSelected_ErrorMessage
data.value: Web search engine provider is not selected. Please configure it in the web browser of plugin settings.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_InvalidWebSearchEngineEndpoint_ErrorMessage
data.value: Provided endpoint is invalid; please ensure it is a valid absolute URI.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_GoogleSearchEngineIdNotSet_ErrorMessage
data.value: Google Search Engine ID is not set. Please configure it in the plugin settings.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_UnsupportedWebSearchEngineProvider_ErrorMessage
data.value: Web search engine provider is not supported. Please switch it in the plugin settings.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_WebSearchEngineApiKeyNotSet_ErrorMessage
data.value: API key is not set. Please configure it in the plugin settings.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_PuppeteerBrowserDownloadConnectionError_ErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to connect to the Puppeteer browser download URL.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_PuppeteerBrowserLaunchError_ErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to launch the Puppeteer browser.

data.name: ScreenSelectionToolTip_TipText_Normal
data.value: Left click to select, Right click or Esc to cancel Scroll wheel or number keys to switch pick modes

data.name: Assistant_RequestTimeoutSeconds_Description
data.value: Set the wait time for the model to return results, measured in seconds. For slower models (such as thinking models and local models), consider extending this time appropriately.

data.name: DynamicWebProxy_CreateProxy_EndpointSchemeUnsupported_ErrorMessage
data.value: Proxy server scheme '{0}' is not supported.

data.name: FileAttachment_Create_FileTooLarge
data.value: File size ({0}) exceeds the maximum allowed size ({1}).

data.name: DisplaySettings_FontSize_Description
data.value: Adjust the global font display size.

data.name: ChatWindow_ModelWarning_Unavailable
data.value: The current assistant model is unsupported, requests may fail.

data.name: ChatWindow_ModelWarning_Deprecated
data.value: The current assistant model was deprecated on {0}, please switch to a newer model soon.

data.name: ChatWindow_ModelWarning_DeprecatingSoon
data.value: The current assistant model is expected to be deprecated on {0}.

data.name: McpTransportConfiguration_Name_ValidationErrorMessage_Regex
data.value: Only numbers, letters, and the characters “-”, “_” are permitted.

data.name: ValidationErrorMessage_MaxLength
data.value: The length must not exceed {0} characters.

data.name: ChatPluginConsentRequest_MCP_Header
data.value: “{0}” is an MCP tool. Everywhere cannot verify its required permissions. Please ensure it comes from a trusted source, and Everywhere assumes no responsibility for its consequences.

data.name: ValidationErrorMessage_NullKey
data.value: The item key cannot be empty.

data.name: ValidationErrorMessage_NullValue
data.value: The item value cannot be empty.

data.name: HandledFunctionInvokingException_FunctionNotFound
data.value: The model attempted to invoke the non-existent tool '{0}', likely due to hallucination.

data.name: McpTransportConfigurationForm_DescriptionTextBox_Label
data.value: Description (For display and differentiation purposes only)

data.name: ChatPluginPageViewModel_EditMcpPlugin_DialogTitle
data.value: Edit MCP Plugin (Fields marked with * are required)

data.name: ChatPluginPageViewModel_AddMcpPlugin_DialogTitle
data.value: Add MCP Plugin (Fields marked with * are required)

data.name: ChatPluginPageViewModel_RemoveMcpPlugin_ConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove “{0}”?

data.name: ChatPluginManager_McpPluginMissingRuntime_Warning
data.value: This MCP server requires {0}, but Everywhere could not find it.

data.name: ChatPluginManager_McpPluginMissingRuntime_StartFailure
data.value: This MCP server requires {0}. Install it before starting the server.

data.name: ChatPluginManager_McpPluginCommandNotFound_StartFailure
data.value: The MCP command "{0}" was not found. Install it or update the command path.

data.name: DebugFeaturesControl_CreateDumpToast_Content
data.value: Please wait while the dump is being created. Everywhere will be unresponsive during this time.

data.name: MacOS_PermissionHelper_PleaseGrantAccessibilityPermission
data.value: Please grant Accessibility permissions to the application in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Accessibility, and restart the application.

data.name: Entrance_EverywhereAlreadyRunning
data.value: Everywhere is already running. Please check your system tray for the application window.

data.name: HandledFunctionInvokingException_ArgumentMissing
data.value: The required parameter '{0}' is missing from the tool invocation, likely due to hallucination.

data.name: MacOS_BuiltInChatPlugin_System_Description
data.value: Control macOS system applications and perform system tasks.

data.name: MacOS_BuiltInChatPlugin_System_ManageReminders_DenyMessage
data.value: You denied the request to manage reminders.

data.name: MacOS_BuiltInChatPlugin_System_ManageCalendar_DenyMessage
data.value: You denied the request to manage calendar.

data.name: MacOS_BuiltInChatPlugin_System_ManageNotes_DenyMessage
data.value: You denied the request to manage notes.

data.name: MacOS_BuiltInChatPlugin_System_SendEmail_DenyMessage
data.value: You denied the request to send an email.

data.name: MacOS_BuiltInChatPlugin_System_ExecuteScript_DenyMessage
data.value: You denied the request to execute AppleScript.

data.name: MacOS_BuiltInChatPlugin_Zsh_Description
data.value: Provides the ability to execute zsh scripts, allowing direct interaction with the system. However, it is also dangerous and may result in accidental file deletion or system crashes.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Essential_RunSubagent_Description
data.value: Allowing the assistant to assign a brand-new assistant to execute subtasks helps conserve context within individual models while better handling complex tasks.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Essential_ManageTodoList_Description
data.value: Allowing the assistant to maintain a concise to-do list, which proves highly useful when handling complex tasks. Note that this list is temporary and will disappear upon switching conversations or exiting Everywhere.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Essential_Description
data.value: Providing a suite of essential capabilities that empower the assistant to better handle complex tasks.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Essential_AskUserQuestion_Description
data.value: Allowing the assistant to ask questions and gather input from the user through interactive dialogs.

data.name: ManageApiKeyForm_DeleteApiKeys_Dialog_Message
data.value: Are you sure to delete {0} API key(s)? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ManageApiKeyForm_DeleteApiKey_Flyout_Content
data.value: Are you sure to delete? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: AssistantConfiguratorSelector_AdvancedConfiguratorModel_Description
data.value: Freely configure all model parameters, compatible with third-party models.

data.name: AssistantConfiguratorSelector_PresetBasedConfiguratorModel_Description
data.value: Select common models from presets and get started quickly.

data.name: WelcomeView_AssistantStep_Advanced_Message1
data.value: Welcome to advanced mode. You can configure third-party models supported by the API protocol.

data.name: WelcomeView_AssistantStep_Advanced_Message2
data.value: Please note that I cannot guarantee perfect compatibility with all third-party models.

data.name: AdvancedAssistantConfigurator_InvalidEndpoint
data.value: Must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_AlwaysStartNewChat_Description
data.value: Automatically start a fresh session when summoning the app via shortcut, bypassing the previous conversation.

data.name: McpImportForm_Description
data.value: Paste your MCP configuration JSON below, or import it from a local file.

data.name: Linux_ShortcutListener_Register_FailedToGrabHotkey
data.value: Failed to grab the hotkey. The key combination may be already in use.

data.name: ScreenSelectionToolTip_TipText_Free
data.value: Hold left mouse button to select, right-click or Esc to exit Use scroll wheel or number keys to switch selection mode

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_AutomaticallyAddTextSelection_Description
data.value: When enabled, selected text will be automatically added as an attachment.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_VisualContext_ListWindows_Description
data.value: List all windows on the screen.

data.name: ExperimentalBadge_ToolTip
data.value: This is an experimental feature that may lead to unexpected errors and results.

data.name: SoftwareSettings_IsUserStartupEnabled_Description
data.value: Everywhere will automatically run after startup.

data.name: Linux_BuiltInChatPlugin_FdFind_Description
data.value: Search for files on your computer using fd-find (a high-performance local file search tool). This tool requires fd-find to be installed to use.

data.name: Linux_BuiltInChatPlugin_FdFind_SearchFiles_Description
data.value: Search for files or directories on Linux using fd-find.

data.name: Linux_BuiltInChatPlugin_Bash_Description
data.value: Provides the ability to execute bash scripts, allowing direct interaction with the system. However, it is also dangerous and may result in accidental file deletion or system crashes.

data.name: PersistentState_VisualContextLengthLimit_Description
data.value: The maximum length limit for capturing visual context, measured in tokens. This is an estimate and cannot guarantee precise limits. For simple contexts, the token consumption is often less than this number; for complex contexts, the excess will be truncated.

data.name: Greetings_Tip1
data.value: 💡You can quickly switch assistants using Ctrl + Number Keys

data.name: Greetings_Tip2
data.value: 💡You can quickly switch by using the scroll wheel on the assistant icon in the bottom left corner

data.name: Greetings_Tip3
data.value: 💡You can set the Copilot key as the Everywhere shortcut

data.name: ChatContextManager_RemoveSelectedDialog_Content
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {0} chat items?

data.name: PersistentState_MaxContextRounds_Description
data.value: Limits how many recent user-message rounds are kept in context. One round consists of one user message and the corresponding assistant response.

data.name: ChatService_Error_CustomAssistantNotSelected
data.value: Please select an assistant in the bottom left corner. If none are available, configure one in settings.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_VisualContext_GetVisualTree_Description
data.value: Read the visual tree of a window or element on screen.

data.name: UserProfilePresenter_CloudDescriptionTextBlock_Text
data.value: Sign up for free credits and get access to popular models right out of the box. More features like cloud sync are coming soon...

data.name: AssistantConfiguratorSelector_OfficialConfiguratorModel_Description
data.value: Official service. No API key setup needed—it's ready when you are.

data.name: Entrance_FailedToInitializeRuntimeConstants
data.value: Failed to initialize data directory; please ensure you have write permissions for the data directory. {0}

data.name: CustomAssistant_OutputLimit_Description
data.value: Maximum output length for the conversation (output_limit). This will affect the parameters for model requests (especially Anthropic), so please set it to a realistic value.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_UnpaidNotification_Title
data.value: You have pending payments, please address them soon

data.name: UserProfilePresenter_CloudSyncToggle_Tip
data.value: Enabling this will automatically sync your chat history across devices

data.name: HandledChatException_RegionNotSupport
data.value: Service does not support requests from current region or location.

data.name: HandledChatException_JsonError
data.value: An error occurred while parsing the response from the service, indicating an unexpected JSON format or content.

data.name: SettingsCategory_Settings_SystemAssistant_Description
data.value: Configure the key assistant required for Everywhere, used for title summarization, context compression, etc. If not configured, Everywhere will use the current best model as the required assistant.

data.name: SettingsCategory_Settings_Display_Description
data.value: Configure how Everywhere displays interface content, such as language, theme, font size, etc.

data.name: SettingsCategory_Settings_Proxy_Description
data.value: Configure the network proxy. After configuration, all network requests from Everywhere will go through this proxy.

data.name: SettingsCategory_Settings_Shortcut_Description
data.value: Configure the global shortcuts used by Everywhere for a personalized experience.

data.name: SettingsCategory_Settings_Common_Description
data.value: Configure settings related to the operation of Everywhere.

data.name: SettingsCategory_Settings_ChatWindow_Description
data.value: Configure the behavior of the chat window.

data.name: ShortcutSettings_PickVisualElement_Desription
data.value: Set a shortcut key to select a visual element at any time, which will then invoke the chat window.

data.name: ShortcutSettings_TakeScreenshot_Desription
data.value: Set a shortcut key to capture a screenshot anytime, which will then open the chat window.

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_Browser_SummarizePageCommand_Description
data.value: Get a quick summary of this web page

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_Browser_ExplainCommand_Description
data.value: Explain the content of this web page

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_Browser_FactCheckCommand_Description
data.value: Verify claims made on this page

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_CodeEditor_ReviewCommand_Description
data.value: Get a code review with suggestions

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_CodeEditor_DocumentCommand_Description
data.value: Generate documentation comments for the current code

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_CodeEditor_FindBugsCommand_Description
data.value: Identify potential bugs or issues in the current code

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_CodeEditor_OptimizeCommand_Description
data.value: Optimize the performance of the current code

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_TextSelection_ExplainCommand_Description
data.value: Explain or define the selected text

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_TextSelection_RewriteCommand_Description
data.value: Rewrite or improve the selected text

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_TextSelection_GrammarCommand_Description
data.value: Check and correct grammar in the selected text

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_Global_WhatIsThisCommand_Description
data.value: Explain the current selection or context

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_Global_HelpCommand_Description
data.value: Get assistance with the current context

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_File_SummarizeCommand_Description
data.value: Summarize the content of the file(s)

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_File_ExtractKeyPointsCommand_Description
data.value: Extract and list the main points from the file(s)

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_File_TranslateDocumentCommand_Description
data.value: Translate the content of the file(s)

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_File_AnalyzeDataCommand_Description
data.value: Analyze the data and provide insights

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_File_VisualizeDataCommand_Description
data.value: Suggest how to visualize this data

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_File_CompareCommand_Description
data.value: Compare the contents of these files

data.name: WelcomeView_SoftLoginStep_Message1
data.value: I've prepared some free credits for you to start experiencing right away.

data.name: WelcomeView_HardLoginStep_Message1
data.value: Welcome to Native Mode. You need to authenticate to use our cloud services.

data.name: WelcomeView_HardLoginStep_Message2
data.value: Please log in to access your credit data, or go back to choose another mode.

data.name: WelcomeView_AssistantStep_Official_Message1
data.value: Please select a model to see details. I will keep updating to follow the latest models.

data.name: OfficialModelDefinitionForm_DeprecationToast_Text
data.value: The current model is expected to be deprecated on {0}

data.name: OfficialModelDefinitionForm_ModelUnavailableToast_Text
data.value: The selected model is no longer in the official model list.

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_EnableVisualElementPickAnimation_Description
data.value: Show a smooth physical trajectory animation when adding an visual element to the chat window.

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_EnableVisualContextAnimation_Description
data.value: Highlight processed elements with a scanning animation during context analysis.

data.name: HandledFunctionInvokingException_InvalidResult
data.value: The tool's return result is incorrect: {0}

data.name: ChatContext_TemporaryToggleButton_ToolTip
data.value: Temporary Chat: Once enabled, the current chat will not be saved and will be deleted when switching or starting a new conversation.

data.name: SystemAssistantSettings_TitleGeneration_Desription
data.value: Configure the assistant for automatically naming conversation titles.

data.name: ChatWindowSettings_AutomaticallyGenerateTitle_Description
data.value: When enabled, automatically summarizes the conversation title based on the first message.

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_Browser_TranslateCommand_ArgumentHint
data.value: Target language for translation, defaults to current language

data.name: Strategy_BuiltIn_File_AnalyzeCodeCommand_Description
data.value: Explains code and analyzes potential issues

data.name: HandledSystemException_UserNotLogin
data.value: You are not logged in. Please log in to use Everywhere cloud services.

data.name: HandledChatException_TemperatureNotSupport
data.value: The model does not support the temperature parameter, or the parameter is out of range. Restoring to default value can resolve this issue.

data.name: HandledChatException_TopPNotSupport
data.value: The model does not support the top_p parameter, or the parameter is out of range. Restoring to default value can resolve this issue.

data.name: CustomAssistantPage_EmptyContent_SelectInstruction
data.value: Select an item on the left to view details

data.name: CustomAssistantPage_EmptyContent_EmptyListInstruction
data.value: The assistant list is empty. Create one to get started

data.name: ChatPluginPage_EmptyContent_SelectInstruction
data.value: Select an item on the left to view details

data.name: UserProfilePresenter_ErrorTextBlock_Text
data.value: Unable to log in to cloud services

data.name: ChatAttachmentItemsControl_FileAttachment_NotSupportToolTip_Tip
data.value: This attachment type is not supported by the model, but the model can still see the metadata and be prompted to use tools to process it.

data.name: HandledFunctionInvokingException_FunctionCallingDisabled
data.value: The model is blocked from calling tools.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_OAuthError
data.value: Authorization failed ({0}): You may have canceled the operation, or the server denied the request. {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_InvalidState
data.value: The login session has expired or there is a security risk. For your account's safety, please close the page and re-initiate the login.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_MissingCode
data.value: Failed to obtain a valid authorization credential, please try again.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_TokenInvalidGrant
data.value: Your saved login has expired or was refreshed elsewhere. Please sign in again. Server response: {0} - {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_TokenInvalidClient
data.value: The login service rejected this app's OAuth client configuration. Please update the app or contact support. Server response: {0} - {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_TokenEndpointUnavailable
data.value: The login service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later. Server response: {0} - {1}

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_TokenRejected
data.value: The login service rejected the token request. Please try signing in again. Server response: {0} - {1}

data.name: PersistentState_ReasoningEffortLevel_Description
data.value: Only applicable to certain models; if an error occurs, please revert to the default value.

data.name: DisplaySettings_AccentColor_Description
data.value: Choose the highlight color for the application.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_VisualContext_ExecuteVisualActions_ExecuteConsent_Header
data.value: Do you allow the following automated actions?

data.name: WebBrowserSettings_ShowBrowser_Description
data.value: When enabled, the browser will be displayed while extracting webpage content, which is generally not recommended. A restart is required for changes to take effect.

data.name: WebBrowserSettings_OpenBrowser_Description
data.value: Opens an instance of the web browser used for extracting webpages. You can log in to frequently used sites in advance to reduce the chances of being flagged as a bot during extraction. For compatibility, the first launch may automatically download the web browser, which may take some time depending on network conditions.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Web_CannotOpenBrowserInHeadlessMode_ErrorMessage
data.value: The web browser is running in the background and cannot be opened.

data.name: OfficialWebSearchEngineProvider_TimeRange_Description
data.value: The time range going back from the current date, used to filter results by publication date or last updated date. This is useful when looking for sources of published or updated data. This option does not affect invocation costs.

data.name: OfficialWebSearchEngineProvider_Topic_Description
data.value: The category of the search. For example, 'News' is very useful for getting real-time updates, especially on significant events in sports and mainstream media coverage. 'General' is used for broader searches that may include various sources. This option does not affect invocation costs.

data.name: OfficialWebSearchEngineProvider_Depth_Description
data.value: Controls the trade-off between latency and relevance; this option does not affect invocation costs.

data.name: ChatInputArea_WebSearchButton_ToolTip
data.value: Use web search to enhance the timeliness of assistant responses.

data.name: Greetings_NotLoginTip1
data.value: 💡 Everywhere's cloud service connects to official pure-blood large models.

data.name: Greetings_NotLoginTip2
data.value: 💡 Register for Everywhere's cloud service to enjoy bonus packages and free trials.

data.name: Greetings_Tip4
data.value: 💡 Even when adding a single visual element attachment, Everywhere intelligently extracts the entire context.

data.name: Greetings_Tip5
data.value: 💡 Only two people are core developers of Everywhere; contributions and feedback are welcome.

data.name: Greetings_Tip6
data.value: 💡 Feel free to join our official community on the About page to interact with us~

data.name: TerminalPluginSettings_AutoApprove_WarningToast_Content
data.value: Auto approval for terminal tools is enabled. Improper use by the assistant may lead to serious system crashes or irreversible file loss. Please proceed at your own risk.

data.name: TerminalPluginSettings_AutoApprove_Description
data.value: When enabled, all terminal operations will be automatically approved without manual confirmation. Improper use by the assistant may lead to serious system crashes or irreversible file loss. Enabling this option means you have assessed and are willing to assume the risk.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Terminal_ExecuteScript_ScriptConsent_Header
data.value: The following shell script will be executed

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Terminal_ExecuteScript_DenyMessage
data.value: User denied consent for shell script execution.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Terminal_Description
data.value: Provides the ability to execute shell commands via a pseudo-terminal, allowing direct interaction with the system. However, it is also dangerous and may result in accidental file deletion or system crashes.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Terminal_ExecuteScript_Description
data.value: Invoke the system terminal to execute scripts.

data.name: TerminalPluginSettings_ShellPath_Description
data.value: Custom path for the terminal executable, supporting only PowerShell, zsh, and bash. Leave empty for automatic detection.

data.name: BuiltInChatPlugin_Terminal_UnsupportedShell
data.value: The current shell type is unsupported or not found. Please ensure that at least PowerShell, zsh, or bash is installed on your computer.

data.name: Assistant_ReasoningEffort_Description
data.value: Select a custom reasoning intensity. Different models support different options; please refer to the corresponding documentation for details. Leaving it blank means this parameter will not be included in the request.

data.name: Assistant_ThinkingType_Description
data.value: For models that support dynamic reasoning toggling, this option can be used to disable model reasoning. Leaving it blank means this parameter will not be included in the request.

data.name: Assistant_ThinkingBudget_Description
data.value: Set the budget for reasoning output, measured in tokens.

data.name: HandledChatException_InvalidThoughtSignature
data.value: The signature is private data for certain thought models, and Everywhere cannot decode it. Switching between different provider models in a context with thought content may cause this issue; starting a new conversation can resolve it.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_BannedNotification_Title
data.value: You've been banned for violating our terms of service. Please contact support for details.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_CreditsRunningLowNotification_Content
data.value: You've used over 80% of your credits. Consider switching to a more economical model.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_FreeWebSearchRunningLowNotification_Content
data.value: You've used over 80% of your free cloud search queries. Additional searches will deduct credits.

data.name: OAuthCloudClient_FreeWebSearchDepletedNotification_Content
data.value: You've exhausted your free cloud search queries. Future searches will deduct credits.

data.name: ChatInputArea_UpdateButton_ToolTip
ChatMessageControl_ContinueButton_ToolTip
data.value: Continue from here and retry without clearing existing assistant messages in this round

data.name: HandledChatException_InvalidReasoningContent
data.value: The model's deep reasoning content did not return correctly. This issue may occur if you switched models within the same chat.

data.name: SystemAssistantSettings_ImageUnderstanding_Description
data.value: A visual expert called upon by the main assistant as needed. When the main assistant deems it necessary, it will use the 'Assign New Assistant' tool to have it analyze images. Please ensure the selected model has visual recognition capabilities.

data.name: TerminalView_SuccessToolTip_Tip
data.value: Command started at {0}, completed successfully after {1} seconds

data.name: TerminalView_ErrorToolTip_Tip
data.value: Command started at {0}, failed after {1} seconds with exit code {2}

data.name: SystemAssistantSettings_DefaultSubagent_Description
data.value: The default assistant called upon by the main assistant as needed. When the main assistant assigns routine tasks through the 'Assign New Assistant' tool, it is handled and results are returned by this assistant in an independent context. 'Auto-select' means using the same subagent as the main assistant.
